title: JSON Feed 1.1 Item
description: Schema describing a single item in a JSON Feed 1.1 document. Each item MUST have an id and at least one of content_html or content_text.

id.description: Unique identifier for the item. SHOULD be a URL that resolves to the item's permalink for maximum interoperability.

url.description: Permalink to the item on its native website.

external_url.description: URL of an external page the item refers to (e.g., a link blog entry pointing elsewhere).

title.description: Item title. Optional — content may stand on its own without a title (microblog-style items).

content_html.description: HTML rendering of the item content. At least one of content_html or content_text MUST be provided.

content_text.description: Plain-text rendering of the item content.

summary.description: Plain-text summary, typically shown in a feed reader's item list.

image.description: URL of the main image for the item.

banner_image.description: URL of a banner image for the item.

date_published.description: Date the item was originally published (RFC 3339).

date_modified.description: Date the item was last modified (RFC 3339).

tags.description: Plain-text tags applied to the item.

attachments.description: Related resources such as podcast episodes (audio/mp3) or video files attached to the item.
